---
title: "The Rev. James Thomas Houssemayne Du Boulay"
---

## The Rev. James Thomas Houssemayne Du Boulay

**Dates:** (1832-1915)

### Description

assistant master of Winchester College

### Biography

He married (1860) Alice Mead Cornish (d. 1925), sister of George Kestell Cornish (1856-1925), Bishop of Madagascar.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 10th 1885
- Letter from March 27th 1882

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
